Axym local docs index

- LICENSE
- CHANGELOG.md
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- SECURITY.md
- README.md — install, smoke test, sample proof path, real integration path
- docs/commands/axym.md — command guide and supported surfaces
- docs-site/public/llm/axym.md — launch-facing identity-governed action summary for LLM and search consumers
- docs/operator/quickstart.md — operator walkthrough for smoke, sample, and real integration paths
- docs/operator/integration-model.md — runtime ownership model and sync/async evidence flow
- docs/operator/integration-boundary.mmd — Mermaid source for the integration-boundary diagram
- .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml
- .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml
- .github/pull_request_template.md
